reason: The current signed 15-bit fixnum representation cannot represent the required full unsigned 16-bit peekw result range 0..65535. The owner rule admitted these helpers only if nearly free; a representation change is not nearly free.
replacement: Use byte-sized peek/poke operations in 1.1. Full unsigned word composition is not available because the required ash/logior bit operations are deferred with the shelf-format work to C2.2.
revisit_condition: C2.2 must revisit word composition after delivering the deferred bit operations. A future word or wider integer representation may then reopen peekw/pokew through a new explicit contract; no runtime tombstone symbol is allocated now.
